Metadata.title: Alina Bloemen — Fresh Flowers & Bouquets Delivery
Metadata.description: Alina Bloemen: fresh bouquets, floral arrangements, wedding and event flowers with fast delivery in the Netherlands. Order flowers online for any occasion.
Metadata.keywords: flowers, bouquets, flower delivery, florist, wedding flowers, Netherlands

Home.title: Alina Bloemen
Home.subtitle: Fresh flowers, bouquets and arrangements
Home.events_weddings_desc: We create the perfect atmosphere for your special day
Home.about_text: Welcome to Alina Bloemen — a place where every bouquet is created with love, attention to detail, and a sense of style. We are just beginning our journey, but we already strive to give emotions through fresh flowers, modern arrangements, and a personalized approach to each order.

Catalog.count: {count, plural, =0 {No products} one {# product} other {# products}}
Catalog.empty: There are no products in this collection yet.

Product.disclaimer: The composition of the bouquet may vary slightly depending on the season and the availability of flowers. If necessary, we will replace individual flowers with similar ones, preserving the style, palette, and overall aesthetics of the arrangement.

Footer.description: Creating beautiful floral moments from Limburg across the Netherlands.
Footer.tagline: Decoration for weddings and parties · arches, bouquets, arrangements

Payment.checking_desc: Please wait while we confirm your payment.

Payment.sync_error_desc: Your payment is being processed. Please contact us if you don't receive confirmation.
Payment.timeout_desc: We're still confirming your payment. Please contact us if needed.
Payment.error_desc: Something went wrong. Please contact us.
